question_text: A radio station broadcasts on a frequency of 100 MHz. Radio waves travel at 3 × 10⁸ m/s. What is the wavelength of the radio wave?
explanation: First convert frequency: 100 MHz = 100 × 10⁶ Hz = 1 × 10⁸ Hz. Using λ = v/f = (3 × 10⁸)/(1 × 10⁸) = 3 m. This requires applying the wave equation with scientific notation.
